summary: Testing completed for External Branches Management feature and Owner Wallet Lock icons. All backend APIs (6/6) passed. Frontend pages load correctly with all required UI elements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: External Branches Management feature fully implemented and tested. Owner Wallet uses Lock icons instead of PiggyBank. All APIs working correctly.

owner_wallet_lock_icons.description: Lock icons (Lock, LockOpen, Vault) replaced PiggyBank icon
verified: LockOpen icon visible in amber 'الخزينة الشخصية' (Personal Safe) card
Lock icon used in 'تحويل للخزينة' (Transfer to Safe) button
No PiggyBank reference found in page
Vault icon used in Safe tab section

external_branches_page.description: External Branches Management page (/external-branches) accessible and functional
verified: 4 stat cards displayed: الفروع المباعة, عوائد النسبة الشهرية, قيمة المواد المسحوبة, إجمالي المستحق
Two tabs: الفروع المباعة (Sold Branches) and التقرير الشهري (Monthly Report)
Empty state message displayed when no sold branches
Register Branch dialog with all required fields

external_branches_dashboard_icon.description: External Branches icon in Dashboard Quick Actions

backend_apis.description: All External Branches APIs working correctly
endpoints_tested: GET /api/external-branches/dashboard/stats - Returns stats with sold_branches_count, monthly_revenue, etc.
GET /api/external-branches/ - Returns list of sold branches (empty array when none)
GET /api/external-branches/reports/monthly - Returns monthly report with branches data

screenshots: .screenshots/03_external_branches.png - External Branches page with 4 stat cards
